title: Operation
description: A reusable specification for how work gets done, combining a resource, an action, and capabilities. State transitions are tracked at runtime through Task instances.

examples.name: Close Loan
examples.description: Mark a loan as closed, updating account status and finalizing records

examples.name: Submit Loan Application
examples.description: Borrower submits a completed loan application with required documentation

examples.name: Approve Loan Application
examples.description: Loan officer or automated system approves a loan application after verification

type.description: Identifies this as an operation definition.

operation.description: The operation specification (what work is being defined).

resource.description: The resource type being acted upon (e.g., 'Loan', 'Document', 'User').

action.description: The action being performed on the resource (e.g., 'close', 'approve', 'delete').

capabilities.description: Defines who can perform this operation and under what conditions.

allowedActors.description: List of actor types permitted to perform this operation (e.g., 'borrower', 'loanOfficer', 'agent').

conditions.description: Optional conditions that must be true for the operation to be executable (e.g., pre-conditions on resource state).
